_comment: AF config for this project. Safe defaults shown. Precedence: env var > this file > built-in default.
_phase2_runtime_doc: true = the hook imports+executes the written .py to run algebraic-law property tests (hypothesis). Enable only in trusted/throwaway dirs like scratch/. Env override: AF_HOOK_PHASE2_PBT=1.
_feedback_shape_doc: verbose | skeleton_only | minimal. Use 'minimal' if the hybrid feedback feels noisy.
